entries.title: onInstallmentSelected card callback (Web parity)
entries.description: startCheckout now accepts an optional onInstallmentSelected callback that fires every time the shopper selects or changes an installment option in the card form — including the default pre-selection at render and recalculations after a BIN change — so merchants can keep the cart total in sync with the selected installment. The payload mirrors the Web SDK's OnInstallmentSelectedArgs: installment (Int), label (String), amount { currency, value, totalValue } as strings, additionalData (reserved), and isMerchantInstallment (nullable, reserved for the merchant-installments feature). When installments stop being available after a selection was reported (e.g. the shopper switches to a card without installments), the callback fires once with null so the merchant knows the previous installment information is no longer valid. Fully backwards compatible: with no callback registered there is no behavior change, and an exception inside the merchant's callback never affects the payment flow.

entries.title: Card number length is now validated per card scheme
entries.description: Card numbers are now validated against the expected length for each card scheme, on top of the existing checks, so a number with an invalid length is caught as the customer types and again on submit, before the payment is sent.

entries.title: Saved cards now show a compact summary instead of full card artwork
entries.description: Saved cards now display a compact summary — brand logo, brand name, last 4 digits, cardholder name, and expiry date — instead of the large card artwork, keeping the CVV field visible without scrolling.

entries.title: Stricter card expiry date validation with auto-formatting
entries.description: The card expiry field now auto-formats the date as it is typed, shows a clear "Card has expired" message for past dates, and better distinguishes invalid months.

entries.title: Stronger document and phone field validation
entries.description: Document and phone fields now use numeric-only keyboards where applicable, support many more national document types, show clearer error messages, and reliably prefill saved values without overwriting what the customer has typed.

entries.title: Barcodes on flexible payment actions now render in landscape
entries.description: Fixed an issue where barcodes on flexible payment actions (such as Boleto and INDOMARET) did not display in landscape with the correct proportions. They now match iOS and Web, making them clearer and easier to scan. QR-based methods are unchanged.

entries.title: Click to Pay no longer stalls without a callback URL
entries.description: Fixed an issue where Click to Pay stalled when the checkout session was created without a callback URL. The payment now continues seamlessly with the standard flow.

entries.title: Google Pay payments now include the customer's language for 3DS
entries.description: Fixed an issue where Google Pay payments left the customer's language empty in the browser information used for 3DS authentication and risk evaluation. The language is now correctly included.

entries.title: Card payments with an installment plan now return the one-time token
entries.description: Fixed a regression where card payments with an installment plan did not correctly return the one-time token, preventing these payments from being completed.

entries.title: Card number field no longer advances too early for longer card numbers
entries.description: Fixed an issue where the card number field moved focus to the next field too early for cards that accept more than one length, preventing customers from finishing typing a longer number.

entries.title: Card type toggle no longer shows in the unfolded card form when credit_card_only_processing is enabled
entries.description: Fixed an issue where the credit/debit card type toggle was displayed for Brazilian cards in the unfolded card form (payment method list) even when the merchant had credit_card_only_processing enabled. The full-screen card form received the flag through its call chain, but the unfolded call site did not propagate it, so the composable fell back to its default and always showed the toggle. The visibility check now also resolves the flag directly from the SDK settings, so every card form honors it regardless of the call site.

entries.title: Installment dropdown now shows the per-installment value and the total amount
entries.description: Aligned the card installment dropdown with the Web SDK: each option now shows the per-installment value and the total amount (for example '2x of R$ 500,31 - Total R$ 1.000,61'). The same template is applied to every option regardless of whether financial_costs is present, since its amount is already reflected in the rendered total. If the total is not available the option falls back to the previous per-installment format, and if no amount is available it falls back to the installment count only.

entries.title: Host app no longer fails when a payment return deeplink cannot be opened
entries.description: Fixed an issue so that WebViews no longer fail when trying to open a deeplink if the target app is not installed.

entries.title: Merchant callbacks registered before initialize are no longer lost
entries.description: Fixed a regression where one-time-token and payment-state callbacks were silently dropped for integrations that register their callbacks once and then call Yuno.initialize afterwards (for example cross-platform wrappers that register in the host Activity's onCreate and initialize later). Initialization was unconditionally clearing the previously registered callbacks, so the merchant never received the token or the final/cancellation status even though the payment completed. Initialization no longer clears these callbacks; native integrations that re-register on each call are unaffected.

entries.title: startPayment and startPaymentLite accept an optional payment-state callback
entries.description: Added an optional callbackPaymentState parameter to startPayment and startPaymentLite, aligning them with startPaymentSeamlessLite and continuePayment. Integrators can now re-supply the payment-state callback on each call, giving a per-call registration path for the state delivered through the start-payment flow, such as the cancellation reported when the user dismisses the payment sheet. The parameter is optional and defaults to null, so existing callers are unaffected.

entries.title: Card payments with an installment plan now return the one-time token
entries.description: Fixed a regression where selecting a card with an installment plan produced no one-time token on the merchant callback, so the payment could not be completed. The token endpoint response was being rejected while parsing because the installment amount is delivered as a money object (currency + value); the SDK now reads it correctly and surfaces the token through callbackOTT / callBackTokenWithInformation as before. Other payment methods were not affected.

entries.title: Headless SDK: resume card payments with continueCardPayment
entries.description: Merchants integrating the Headless SDK can now resume a CARD payment created from their backend by calling `continueCardPayment`. The SDK internally executes any pending action — such as the 3DS challenge — waits for the final result, and delivers every payment state and sub-state through a callback, so merchants keep full control of their checkout UI without rendering the challenge themselves. The method works in pure headless integrations: no prior Yuno checkout UI flow is required.

entries.title: Removed getThreeDSecureChallenge from the Headless SDK
entries.description: The headless `getThreeDSecureChallenge` method and its `ThreeDSecureChallengeResponse` type were removed. It returned the raw 3DS challenge URL and required merchants to render and complete the challenge themselves. Migrate to `continueCardPayment`, which executes the challenge internally and reports the resulting payment states through a callback.

entries.title: Card payments with an installment plan now return the one-time token
entries.description: Fixed a regression where selecting a card with an installment plan produced no one-time token on the merchant callback, so the payment could not be completed. The token endpoint response was being rejected while parsing because the installment amount is delivered as a money object (currency + value); the SDK now reads it correctly and surfaces the token through callbackOTT / callBackTokenWithInformation as before. Other payment methods were not affected.

entries.title: Back gesture/button now cancels the 3DS challenge in render mode
entries.description: In render mode, pressing the back button or using the back gesture during a 3D Secure challenge now closes the challenge and returns a cancellation result (CANCELED_BY_USER) to the merchant, matching iOS. Previously the back press was ignored and the payment hung until the server-side challenge timeout. The challenge WebView history is no longer walked on back (which could leave a blank screen); back always cancels.

entries.title: Native 3DS via the optional Yuno3DSNetcetera module
entries.description: A new optional companion module that runs native 3DS challenges and device data collection inside your app. Add the dependency alongside the core SDK and it gets picked up automatically — no extra wiring. Published as Yuno3DSNetcetera 1.0.1 on JFrog and compatible with the core SDK starting at 2.16.0.

entries.title: Real-time form validation
entries.description: Card and alternative payment method forms now validate each field as the buyer types, instead of only at submit. Errors are shown inline, on the field, the moment the input becomes invalid.

entries.title: New compact card form (server-driven slimmerFormEnabled flag)
entries.description: When the `slimmerFormEnabled` flag is turned on for your account, the card form (new card, alternative methods and enrolled card) switches to a more compact visual style: card and address fields render as grouped rows with a single consolidated error message per group. When the flag is off, the previous visual is preserved exactly as is.

entries.title: Auto-advance on the enrolled card form
entries.description: When the buyer enters valid data in the enrolled card flow, focus now jumps to the next field automatically, matching the behavior already present in the new-card form.

entries.title: Google Pay: collect billing address, shipping address and cardholder name
entries.description: Google Pay now requests billing address, shipping address and cardholder name from the buyer whenever the selected payment method requires them, picking the right address format automatically (name only vs. full address). The collected values are forwarded to the backend together with the wallet payload.

entries.title: Google Pay: collect buyer email and phone
entries.description: Google Pay now requests the buyer's email and phone whenever the payment method requires them, and the values are forwarded to the backend as part of the customer payer.

entries.title: Google Autofill on card fields
entries.description: Card number, cardholder name, expiration and CVV fields are now eligible for Google Autofill, so buyers can fill them in with a saved card from Google on Android.

entries.title: Hide the 'secure' badge via flag
entries.description: The 'secure' badge shown in the checkout UI can now be hidden through a server-driven flag.

entries.title: ClearSale device fingerprint
entries.description: On previous versions the ClearSale anti-fraud fingerprint silently failed to register the buyer's device. The fingerprint is now collected and submitted correctly.

entries.title: Correct installment plan selected when the backend ships per-installment ids
entries.description: In some configurations the wrong installment plan could be selected when the backend returned both a generic code and a per-installment id. The SDK now consistently uses the per-installment id, so the buyer's chosen plan matches what is sent to the backend.

entries.title: Every code is shown on payment-code screens
entries.description: On payment methods where the post-payment screen presents more than one code to the buyer (for example a barcode plus a digital line), only the first one was being rendered. All codes returned by the backend are now displayed.

entries.title: Visible separator on the payment-code screen
entries.description: On the post-payment code screen (PIX, OXXO, boleto, and similar flows), the horizontal line that separates the code area from the copy / download buttons was rendered in a color so close to the background that it was effectively invisible. It now uses a contrasting tone in both light and dark mode.

entries.title: Flutter Plugin Lifecycle Crash
entries.description: Fixed a crash caused by Flutter plugin lifecycle incompatibility with the Android SDK on process death.

entries.title: Flexible Actions in Enrollment
entries.description: Enrollment now supports the same dynamic action screens used in payments, including PIN, image, payment code, OTP, and info screens.

entries.title: Installment Details on Tokenization
entries.description: When a card is tokenized with installments selected, the installment information — plan, rate, amount, and selected option — is now returned alongside the one-time token.

entries.title: Separate Billing and Shipping Address Forms
entries.description: Added separate billing and shipping address sections with a same-as-shipping checkbox, including a `BILLING_ONLY` section type and refined field ordering and focus behavior.

entries.title: Auto-Advance Between Card Fields
entries.description: Card form now auto-advances focus to the next field on valid input, including correct handling when the CVV field is hidden, when the save-card checkbox is present, and inside the unfolded card form.

entries.title: Dynamic CVV Limit for Enrolled Cards
entries.description: The CVV input now applies the correct length limit for enrolled cards based on the card's `securityCodeLength` instead of the default 3-digit limit.

entries.title: Seamless Flow Automation Mode
entries.description: Added a seamless checkout flow tailored for automation mode to support end-to-end testing scenarios.

entries.title: 3DS WebView Loading Indicator
entries.description: Added a loading progress indicator to the 3DS `WebView` to communicate state during authentication.

entries.title: MVVM and Architecture Cleanup
entries.description: Refactored to MVVM using use cases and `StateFlow`, migrated `BehaviorSubject` usages to `StateFlow`, decomposed `ContinueCheckoutFragment`, removed the service locator, and purified the domain layer by removing `Parcelable` and Android framework dependencies. No public API changes required.

entries.title: Customer Session for Enrollment Card Info
entries.description: The card-info API now receives `customer_session` in enrollment flows for improved fraud and risk signals. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Enrolled Card Flow Address Sections
entries.description: Migrated the enrolled card flow to use the new billing and shipping address sections, prefilling shipping with billing when empty.

entries.title: Shipping and Billing Validation Focus
entries.description: Submit now scrolls to and focuses the first invalid shipping or billing field, and the keyboard `Next` button correctly advances through address fields.

entries.title: Installments Dropdown Amount
entries.description: The installments dropdown now shows the amount for items that don't have `financial_costs`, ensuring consistent display.

entries.title: CheckoutModel Singleton Update
entries.description: Fixed `updateCheckoutSession` replacing the `CheckoutModel` singleton with a copy, which broke captured references across the SDK.

entries.title: Edge-to-Edge in SeamlessCheckoutActivity
entries.description: Applied the edge-to-edge fix to `SeamlessCheckoutActivity` and fixed double system-bars padding after the WebView and 3DS flows on Samsung devices.

entries.title: Custom Font Family Coverage
entries.description: Merchant-defined `YunoConfig.styles.fontFamily` is now applied across all SDK components.

entries.title: Mercado Pago Fingerprint Obfuscation
entries.description: Serialized Mercado Pago SDK fingerprint fields and added consumer ProGuard rules so fingerprinting survives R8 obfuscation in merchant release builds.

entries.title: WebSocket Reconnection in 3DS Flow
entries.description: Fixed WebSocket reconnection after the app returns from the background during a 3DS flow.

entries.title: Billing and Shipping Checkbox Autofill
entries.description: Fixed the same-as-shipping checkbox autofill behavior based on prefilled customer data.

entries.title: Locale Translations
entries.description: Added missing translations for Hindi (`hi`), Bengali (`bn`), Malayalam (`ml`), and Urdu (`ur`) locales.

entries.title: Font Family Customization
entries.description: Merchant-defined `fontFamily` set in `YunoConfig.styles` is now applied across all SDK components. No API changes required.

entries.title: WebView State
entries.description: Improved loading state handling during WebView transitions for a smoother checkout experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: 3DS Redirect Handling
entries.description: Enhanced 3DS redirect handling for broader provider compatibility. No API changes required.

entries.title: Loader Timing Behavior
entries.description: Adjusted loader timing behavior in extended payment flows for a more consistent user experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Keeploader Support
entries.description: Added integration support for Keeploader. Contact your Yuno technical account manager to enable this feature for your account.

entries.title: WebSocket Alignment with iOS
entries.description: Backported the WebSocket alignment hotfix from the 2.6 line: the socket connection now forwards `code`, `public-api-key`, `x-version`, and `x-platform`, and propagates the payment code on reconnect.

entries.title: Dynamic Regional Base URLs
entries.description: The SDK now selects its base URL dynamically based on the region prefix, improving routing reliability for multi-region deployments. No API changes required.

entries.title: Alphanumeric CNPJ Validation
entries.description: Added support for alphanumeric CNPJ validation in Brazilian payment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: Dynamic CVV Length by Card Type
entries.description: The SDK now fetches the maximum CVV length per card type from the API and maps per-brand `security_code_length` values. No API changes required.

entries.title: Cardholder Name Limit Increase
entries.description: The maximum allowed length for `cardholderName` has been increased from 50 to 255 characters. No API changes required.

entries.title: OTT Payment Method Type Display
entries.description: The `payment_parent_method_type` field is now displayed in the OTT component and included in the OTT response. No API changes required.

entries.title: Dynamic Action Warning Banner
entries.description: A warning banner has been added to the dynamic action screen to surface important messaging to users during payment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: Headless Flow Coroutines Migration
entries.description: Headless payment flows have been migrated from callbacks to Kotlin coroutines for improved performance and reliability. No API changes required.

entries.title: WebView Toolbar Overlap on Android 15
entries.description: Fixed a layout issue where the `WebViewActivity` toolbar overlapped the system status bar on devices running Android 15 and above. No API changes required.

entries.title: PSE Issuers Null Response Crash
entries.description: Fixed a crash that occurred when the PSE issuers endpoint returned a null or empty response. No API changes required.

entries.title: CVV State Desync on Brand Switch
entries.description: Fixed a CVV state desynchronization issue that occurred when switching card brands in the step-by-step card form. No API changes required.

entries.title: Enrolled Card Form Skip Bug
entries.description: Fixed a bug where an enrolled card skipped the form entry step when `billingAddress` or `cardholderName` were required fields. No API changes required.

entries.title: Empty Form on All-False Fields
entries.description: Fixed a bug where the card form rendered as empty when all `FieldsRequired` flags were set to false. No API changes required.

entries.title: Mercado Pago Fingerprint R8 Obfuscation
entries.description: Added `@SerializedName` annotations to Mercado Pago fingerprint classes to prevent R8 from obfuscating field names, which was causing declined transactions in merchant release builds.

entries.title: Cardholder Name Visibility Control
entries.description: The cardholder name field is now shown or hidden based on the backend response, replacing the previous static display logic. No API changes required.

entries.title: Punto Pago Kiosk Disclaimer
entries.description: Added a disclaimer message to the Punto Pago kiosk screen to communicate relevant payment terms to users. No API changes required.

entries.title: Cartes Bancaires UI Updates
entries.description: Updated the visual presentation of the Cartes Bancaires payment option to align with current design standards. No API changes required.

entries.title: CheckoutBuilder Migration
entries.description: Removed `cardFlow` from `YunoConfig`. Card flow configuration is now handled exclusively through the Dashboard Checkout Builder. Update your integration before upgrading.

migration_notes.after: Remove `cardFlow` from your `YunoConfig`. Open the Yuno Dashboard and configure your card flow in Checkout > Builder.

entries.title: Seamless Flow Crash
entries.description: Fixed a crash in the seamless checkout flow.

entries.title: URL Download Null Handling
entries.description: Fixed crashes when a URL download fails or returns null, improving robustness of asset and resource fetching.

entries.title: Android 16 Edge-to-Edge Overlap
entries.description: Backported the Android 16 edge-to-edge fix from 2.9.4: corrected UI overlap caused by edge-to-edge layout changes.

entries.title: Payment Method List Enabled State
entries.description: Backported the enabled-state fix from 2.9.4 so payment methods in `PaymentMethodListViewModel` are correctly enabled or disabled based on availability.

entries.title: Mercado Libre SDK Dependency Removed
entries.description: Backported the Mercado Libre SDK dependency removal from the 2.9.3 hotfix: `PaypalMagnesFraud` now uses a remote dependency instead of the embedded library.

entries.title: Payment Selected Callback
entries.description: Added a payment-selected callback to the payment method list composable so merchants can react when the user chooses a payment method.

entries.title: Size Callback for Payment Method List
entries.description: Added a size callback to the payment method list composable, letting merchants adapt their layout to the rendered list dimensions.

entries.title: Arabic Language Support
entries.description: Added Arabic translations across the SDK, including enrollment status screens, with proper plural handling.

entries.title: Android 16 Edge-to-Edge Overlap
entries.description: Fixed UI overlap on Android 16 caused by edge-to-edge changes in `BaseActivity`, `ContinueCheckoutActivity`, and `ScaffoldComponent`.

entries.title: Payment Method List Enabled State
entries.description: Fixed enabled-state conditions in `PaymentMethodListViewModel` so payment methods are correctly enabled or disabled based on availability.

entries.title: Mercado Libre SDK Dependency Removed
entries.description: Removed the bundled Mercado Libre SDK dependency and updated `PaypalMagnesFraud` to use the remote dependency instead of the embedded library, reducing SDK size and easing dependency management.

entries.title: Enrollment Status Polling
entries.description: Improved `GetStatusEnrollmentViewModel` and `EnrollmentHeadlessViewModel` status handling for more reliable enrollment result delivery in headless flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: Bundled PayPal Magnes and Mercado Pago JARs
entries.description: Removed the embedded `magnes-paypal.jar` and `sdk-3.1.0.jar` binaries together with the local `PaypalMagnesFraud` and `MercadoPagoFraud` providers and their initialization paths. Fingerprinting is now provided through remote dependencies, reducing SDK size.

entries.title: subPaymentState Parameter
entries.description: Added a `subPaymentState` parameter to the `callbackPaymentState` callback in `startCheckout()` and `continuePayment()`, providing finer-grained payment status reporting. No API changes required.

entries.title: Google Pay in startPayment
entries.description: Google Pay is now supported in the `startPayment` flow in addition to `startCheckout`. No API changes required.

entries.title: Google Pay Card Type Field
entries.description: Added a new card type field to the Google Pay response object to improve card identification in payment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Scanning via OCR
entries.description: Added card scanning (OCR) functionality powered by Google Pay's solution, allowing users to scan their credit or debit cards using the device camera during checkout. No additional integration changes required beyond enabling the feature.

entries.title: Architecture Improvements
entries.description: Internal architecture improvements to improve SDK stability and maintainability. No API changes required.

entries.title: EdgeToEdge WebView Layout
entries.description: Fixed an EdgeToEdge rendering issue in `WebViewActivity` that caused layout overlap on devices with edge-to-edge display mode enabled. No API changes required.

entries.title: WebSocket Alignment with iOS
entries.description: Aligned the Android `SocketManager` behavior with iOS by forwarding `code`, `public-api-key`, `x-version`, and `x-platform` on socket connect and propagating the payment code on reconnect. Improves stability for payment-code driven flows.

entries.title: Click to Pay Passkey Support
entries.description: Added passkey support for the Click to Pay flow, including `FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TASK` handling for the in-app browser session.

entries.title: WebView Edge-to-Edge Rendering
entries.description: Fixed an edge-to-edge rendering issue affecting `WebView` content on devices using the newer Android display model.

entries.title: Internal Release Pipeline Updates
entries.description: Maintenance release with internal build and versioning updates. No merchant-facing API changes.

entries.title: Google Pay PIX Direct Flow
entries.description: Added support for the Google Pay PIX direct flow, enabling merchants to offer PIX payments through the Google Pay integration.

entries.title: Google Pay PIX merchantName
entries.description: Fixed the `merchantName` parameter being passed incorrectly in the Google Pay PIX flow.

entries.title: Google Pay PIX Direct
entries.description: Added support for Google Pay PIX direct integration, enabling PIX payments via the Google Pay flow. No API changes required.

entries.title: Brazil Hybrid Card Support
entries.description: Added support for Brazil hybrid cards, which are processed as credit by default and can be saved for future use. No API changes required.

entries.title: Chinese Localization (zh-CN)
entries.description: Added complete Chinese Simplified (zh-CN) localization across payment flows, error messages, loaders, and APM screens. No API changes required.

entries.title: External Browser for APM Links
entries.description: APM payment links now open in the device's external browser, improving compatibility and security for third-party payment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: Default Credit Processing for Hybrid Cards
entries.description: Hybrid cards in Brazil are now processed as credit by default in both payment and enrollment flows, and cards can be saved. This behavior is country-gated; ensure your 3DS flow is compatible before upgrading.

entries.title: OTP Screen Visibility in APM Render Mode
entries.description: Fixed an issue where the OTP screen in APM render mode was cut off, making the digit input fields invisible to the user. No API changes required.

entries.title: Checkout Builder Endpoint Updates
entries.description: Updated Checkout Builder endpoint signatures and aligned styling and action rendering with the latest builder schema. No API changes required.

entries.title: Name Fields in Card Forms
entries.description: The `first_name` and `last_name` input fields are now included in the One Step, Step-by-Step, and Enrolled Payment card forms when required by the payment configuration. No API changes required.

entries.title: Geolocation in customer_payer
entries.description: Added support for `latitude` and `longitude` fields in `customer_payer` to enable geolocation data collection for fraud analysis. Pass the coordinates when initializing checkout.

entries.title: renderMode Enrollment Support
entries.description: Added `renderMode` support for enrollment flows in Mobile Lite, enabling manual rendering control via Checkout Builder. No API changes required.

entries.title: CVV Validation Improvements
entries.description: CVV validation for UATP cards is no longer applied when the CVV field is hidden in One Step and Step-by-Step forms. The CVV tooltip no longer reappears when the keyboard is dismissed. No API changes required.

entries.title: Mandatory Expiration Date for Voucher Brands
entries.description: The `expirationDate` field is now mandatory for voucher brands that require it (Sodexo, VR, Elo, Alelo, Ticket), determined via card-iin detection. No API changes required.

entries.title: Luhn Validation Restored
entries.description: Reverted card validation to use Luhn algorithm for all card types. This change restores the previous validation behavior and improves consistency across card brands. No API changes required.

entries.title: Minor Fixes and Updates
entries.description: Applied minor bug fixes and internal stability updates. No API changes required.

entries.title: SVG Icon Support for Brands
entries.description: Added SVG icon support in form headers across full, lite, seamless, and list modes for brands including Sodexo, Elo, Alelo, Bradexco, and Cartes Bancaires. No API changes required.

entries.title: PayPal Enrollment Support
entries.description: Added support for enrolling PayPal as a payment method through the SDK enrollment flow. No API changes required.

entries.title: 13 New Localization Languages
entries.description: Added support for 13 new languages: Indonesian, Malaysian, Thai, Filipino, Traditional Chinese, French, Polish, Italian, German, Russian, Turkish, Dutch, and Swedish. No API changes required.

entries.title: PagBank Integration
entries.description: Integrated PagBank as a new payment method, launched via Chrome Custom Tab. No API changes required.

entries.title: Enhanced Enrolled Card Fields
entries.description: Enrolled card entries now expand instantly to show all payment fields in an unfolded state, improving checkout UX. No API changes required.

entries.title: NuPay Payment Conditions
entries.description: Added NuPay payment conditions and installment options including debit, credit, and additional limit flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: Render Integration for Loader Control
entries.description: Added a render integration mode that allows merchants to manually control SDK loader visibility during payment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: Astropay Enrollment
entries.description: Added support for enrolling Astropay as a payment method through the SDK enrollment flow. No API changes required.

entries.title: MODO APM
entries.description: Added support for MODO as an alternative payment method via deeplink flow.

entries.title: Mercado Pago External Browser
entries.description: Mercado Pago Checkout Pro now opens in the device's external browser instead of a WebView. No integration changes required.

entries.title: Mercado Pago WebView Flow
entries.description: The in-SDK WebView flow for Mercado Pago Checkout Pro is deprecated and will be removed in a future version. Migrate to the external browser flow, which is now the default behavior.

entries.title: Token With Information Callback
entries.description: Added a new `tokenWithInformation` callback to surface card token data during payment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: NuPay Redirect Issue
entries.description: Fixed an issue where NuPay payment redirects did not complete correctly. No API changes required.

entries.title: CVV Validation in Enrollment
entries.description: Fixed incorrect CVV validation logic during the card enrollment flow. No API changes required.

entries.title: Nubank Flow Improvements
entries.description: Improved the Nubank payment flow for a more reliable and consistent user experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: 3DS FAC Fraud Engine
entries.description: Added support for the FAC fraud engine in 3DS authentication flows. Contact your Yuno account manager to enable this feature.

entries.title: Java Version Compatibility
entries.description: Fixed a compatibility issue affecting builds targeting specific Java versions. No API changes required.

entries.title: Cards and Nubank UI/UX
entries.description: Improved the visual design and user experience for card payment forms and the Nubank flow. No API changes required.

entries.title: Chile RUT Validation
entries.description: Improved RUT (Chilean tax ID) validation logic to handle edge cases more accurately. No API changes required.

entries.title: Nubank CNPJ Field Removed
entries.description: Removed the CNPJ input field from the Nubank payment flow to streamline the checkout experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Forms Design and UX
entries.description: Refreshed the design and improved the user experience across all card payment forms. No API changes required.

entries.title: 3DS Netcetera Fraud Engine
entries.description: Added support for the Netcetera fraud engine in 3DS authentication flows. Contact your Yuno account manager to enable this feature.

entries.title: MercadoPago SDK Performance
entries.description: Improved MercadoPago SDK initialization and rendering performance. No API changes required.

entries.title: PIX Santander Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for PIX payments via Santander as a new payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: MercadoPago SDK Performance
entries.description: Further performance improvements to the embedded MercadoPago SDK. No API changes required.

entries.title: Style Overrides
entries.description: Fixed an issue where custom style overrides were not being applied correctly across SDK components. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Flow Expiration Date UX
entries.description: Improved the expiration date input experience in card payment flows for more intuitive data entry. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Flow Improvements
entries.description: General improvements to the card payment flow for stability and usability. No API changes required.

entries.title: DeUna Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for DeUna as a new payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: SDK and Card Flow Performance
entries.description: Performance improvements across the SDK core and card payment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: Pluxe Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Pluxe as a new payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: Google Pay Flow Improvements
entries.description: Improved Google Pay flow reliability and user experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Headless 3DS Challenge URL
entries.description: Added a headless flow to retrieve the 3DS challenge URL for custom 3DS integration scenarios. No API changes required.

entries.title: Headless OTT and 3DS Flow
entries.description: Added a headless flow to generate a one-time token (OTT) and retrieve the 3DS challenge URL, enabling fully custom payment UI implementations. No API changes required.

entries.title: Antifraud OTT Generation Block
entries.description: Fixed an issue where the antifraud module was incorrectly blocking one-time token generation. No API changes required.

entries.title: showPaymentStatus Argument Added
entries.description: Added `showPaymentStatus` boolean argument to `startPaymentLite` and `startPayment` to control whether the SDK displays the error screen after a failed payment. Pass `false` to suppress the SDK error screen and handle it yourself.

entries.title: Mercado Pago Antifraud
entries.description: Added Mercado Pago antifraud integration to enhance fraud prevention for Mercado Pago payment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: Click to Pay Flow Improvements
entries.description: Improved the Click to Pay flow for better reliability and user experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: OTT with Card Info
entries.description: Added a function to create a one-time token that includes full card information during both Enrollment and Payment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: Location Permissions Crash
entries.description: Fixed a crash that occurred when location permissions were not granted by the user. No API changes required.

entries.title: Step-by-Step and One-Step Card Improvements
entries.description: Improved the step-by-step and one-step card payment flows for better reliability and user experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Mercado Pago Wallet Enrollment
entries.description: Added support for enrolling Mercado Pago Wallet via deeplink and Chrome Custom Tab. No API changes required.

entries.title: 3DS and Cybersource Fraud Engines
entries.description: Added support for 3DS and Cybersource fraud engines to strengthen fraud prevention in card payment flows. Contact your Yuno account manager to enable these features.

entries.title: Card Payments Flow Improvements
entries.description: Improved the card payments flow for stability and reliability. No API changes required.

entries.title: SecureFields Component Consolidation
entries.description: Replaced the separate `CardExpiryDate` `EditText` and `TextField` `ItemView` (CVV) components with a single `CardDataStackView` component for SecureFields integration. Update your layout to use `CardDataStackView`.

entries.title: Discover Card Validation
entries.description: Fixed card number validation for Discover cards that was incorrectly rejecting valid card numbers. No API changes required.

entries.title: Antifraud for Cards Flow
entries.description: Added antifraud integration for card payment flows to improve fraud detection during checkout. Contact your Yuno account manager to enable this feature.

entries.title: Click 2 Pay Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Click 2 Pay as a new payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: Supported Language Methods
entries.description: Added programmatic language selection methods, allowing the SDK locale to be set at runtime. No API changes required.

entries.title: SDK Design Refresh
entries.description: Introduced an updated SDK visual design across payment and enrollment screens. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Payments Flow Improvements
entries.description: Improved the card payments flow for better stability and user experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Enrollment Flow Improvements
entries.description: Improved the card enrollment flow for better reliability and user experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Google Pay Flow Improvements
entries.description: Improved Google Pay flow performance and reliability. No API changes required.

entries.title: SDK State After App Kill
entries.description: Fixed an issue where the SDK failed to restore its state correctly after the host app was killed by the system. No API changes required.

entries.title: Google Pay Payment Method
entries.description: Added Google Pay as a supported payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: Voucher Card Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for VOUCHER card payments. No API changes required.

entries.title: SafetyPay Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for SafetyPay as a payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: Efecty Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Efecty as a payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: Nequi Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Nequi as a payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: Yappy Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Yappy as a payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: Sencillito Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Sencillito as a payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Payment Installments
entries.description: Added installments support for card payments, allowing customers to split payments into multiple installments. No API changes required.

entries.title: Antifraud Session ID Generation
entries.description: Added `sessionId` generation for antifraud providers via `startCheckout()`. No API changes required.

entries.title: Persistent Loader Option
entries.description: Added an option to persist the SDK loader between payment steps for a smoother transition experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Step-by-Step Enrollment CVV Fields
entries.description: Fixed missing CVV and expiry fields in the step-by-step card enrollment flow. No API changes required.

entries.title: Google Pay Flow Improvements
entries.description: Improved Google Pay flow performance and reliability. No API changes required.

entries.title: Step-by-Step Enrollment CVV Fields
entries.description: Fixed missing CVV and expiry fields in the step-by-step card enrollment flow. No API changes required.

entries.title: Voucher Card Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for VOUCHER card payments. No API changes required.

entries.title: Google Pay Flow Improvements
entries.description: Improved Google Pay flow performance and reliability. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card and PIX Flow Design
entries.description: Improved the visual design of card step-by-step and PIX payment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: 3DS Flow Improvements for Cards
entries.description: Improved the 3DS authentication flow for card payments for better reliability and compatibility. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Step-by-Step Field Navigation
entries.description: Improved field navigation and focus handling in the step-by-step card form for a smoother data entry experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Step-by-Step Design
entries.description: Improved the visual design of the step-by-step card payment form. No API changes required.

entries.title: Google Pay Payment Method
entries.description: Added Google Pay as a supported payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: Sencillito Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Sencillito as a payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: SafetyPay Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for SafetyPay as a payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: Efecty Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Efecty as a payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: Nequi Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Nequi as a payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: Yappy Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Yappy as a payment method. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Payment Installments
entries.description: Added installments support for card payments, allowing customers to split payments into multiple installments. No API changes required.

entries.title: Antifraud Session ID Generation
entries.description: Added `sessionId` generation for antifraud providers via `startCheckout()`. No API changes required.

entries.title: Persistent Loader Option
entries.description: Added an option to persist the SDK loader between payment steps for a smoother transition experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Loading Screen Design
entries.description: Added a new loading screen design for a more polished SDK experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Mercado Pago Checkout Pro Formless
entries.description: Mercado Pago Checkout Pro no longer requires filling out a form before redirecting, simplifying the checkout experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Step-by-Step Flow Fix
entries.description: Fixed an issue in the step-by-step card payment flow that caused incorrect behavior in certain scenarios. No API changes required.

entries.title: Null Customer Document Crash
entries.description: Fixed a crash that occurred when the customer object had a null document field. No API changes required.

entries.title: Card Flows Improvements
entries.description: General improvements to card payment and enrollment flows for better stability and user experience. No API changes required.

entries.title: Dynamic CVV Requirement for Enrolled Cards
entries.description: Removed the static flag to require CVV on enrolled cards. CVV requirement is now determined dynamically based on the payment method configuration. No API changes required.

entries.title: Cash Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for CASH as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: Bank Transfer Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for BANK_TRANSFER as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: Unlimint Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Unlimint as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: PagSeguro Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for PagSeguro as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: Step-by-Step Card Form Design
entries.description: Fixed visual design issues in the step-by-step card payment form. No API changes required.

entries.title: Tarjeta Clave Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Tarjeta Clave as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: Kushki Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Kushki as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: Khipu Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Khipu as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: CVV Request Flag for Enrolled Cards
entries.description: Added `requestSecurityCode` to `YunoConfig` to enable CVV requests for enrolled card payments at SDK initialization. Set `requestSecurityCode = true` in your `YunoConfig` to prompt users for CVV when paying with enrolled cards.

example.title: Enable CVV for enrolled cards
example.snippet:
data class YunoConfig(
  val cardFlow: CardFormType = CardFormType.ONE_STEP,
  val saveCardEnabled: Boolean = false,
  val requestSecurityCode: Boolean = false
)

entries.title: OTP Screen Expiration Timer
entries.description: Added a countdown timer to the OTP screen to communicate payment expiration time to users. No API changes required.

entries.title: EnrollmentMethodsListView Component
entries.description: Added `EnrollmentMethodsListView()` component to display payment methods available for enrollment. No API changes required.

entries.title: Paga con Rappi Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Paga con Rappi as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: Arcus Cash Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Arcus Cash as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: Daviplata Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for Daviplata as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: CoDi Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for CoDi as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: PayValida Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for PayValida as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: Save Card via YunoConfig
entries.description: Added `saveCardEnabled` to `YunoConfig` to enable or disable the Save Card option during payment. Set `saveCardEnabled = true` in your `YunoConfig` during `initialize` to allow users to save their cards.

example.title: Enable save card in YunoConfig
example.snippet:
data class YunoConfig(
  val cardFlow: CardFormType = CardFormType.ONE_STEP,
  val saveCardEnabled: Boolean = false
)

entries.title: Payment and Enrollment Cancel State
entries.description: Fixed incorrect state reported when a user cancels during payment or enrollment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: SPEI Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for SPEI as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: Step-by-Step Card Enrollment and Payment
entries.description: Added a step-by-step card form for both Enrollment and Payment flows, allowing users to enter card data field by field. No API changes required.

entries.title: Enrollment State Callback
entries.description: Added an enrollment state callback to `startEnrollment`, allowing you to respond to enrollment lifecycle events without using `onActivityResult`. No API changes required.

entries.title: Payment State Callback in continuePayment
entries.description: Added a payment state callback to `continuePayment`, allowing you to handle payment continuation events without using `onActivityResult`. No API changes required.

entries.title: One-Time Token Callback in startPayment
entries.description: Added a one-time token callback to `startPayment`, allowing you to receive the OTT directly without using `onActivityResult`. No API changes required.

entries.title: Spanish Typo in Card Payment
entries.description: Fixed a typo in the Spanish localization for the card payment screen title. No API changes required.

entries.title: Document Number Field Error Message
entries.description: Fixed an incorrect error message displayed on the document number input field. No API changes required.

entries.title: startPayment Callback Migration
entries.description: Added a direct callback parameter to `startPayment` to replace `onActivityResult` for receiving payment results. Update your integration to use the new callback parameter instead of `onActivityResult`.

entries.title: initEnrollment Callback Migration
entries.description: Added `initEnrollment` method with a direct callback to replace `onActivityResult` for receiving enrollment results. Update your integration to use `initEnrollment` with the callback parameter instead of `onActivityResult`.

entries.title: Production Environment Tag Hidden
entries.description: Fixed an issue where the environment label was displayed for production API keys. The tag is now hidden in production builds. No API changes required.

entries.title: Credit Card Enrollment Flow
entries.description: Added a full credit card enrollment flow to the SDK, allowing users to save cards for future payments. No API changes required.

entries.title: EnrollmentPaymentMethodListView Component
entries.description: Added `EnrollmentPaymentMethodListView()` and `UnEnrolledPaymentMethodListView()` components to display enrolled and un-enrolled payment methods separately. No API changes required.

entries.title: PaymentMethodListView onSelected Event
entries.description: Added an `onSelected` event to `PaymentMethodListView` for responding to user payment method selection. No API changes required.

entries.title: startEnrollment Requires Country Code
entries.description: `startEnrollment` now requires a country code parameter (e.g., `"CO"`). Add the country code argument to all `startEnrollment` calls in your integration.

entries.title: testResult Options Removed
entries.description: Removed `testResult` configuration options from the SDK. Remove any references to `testResult` from your integration code.

entries.title: Expiration Date Validation
entries.description: Improved expiration date validation in the Credit Card form to reject invalid dates more accurately. No API changes required.

entries.title: Enrollment UX After External App
entries.description: Fixed a UX issue in the enrollment flow that occurred after returning from an external app interaction, such as a bank app redirect. No API changes required.

entries.title: 404 Error After Enrollment
entries.description: Fixed a 404 error that was triggered after completing the card enrollment flow. No API changes required.

entries.title: Infinite Loader in Payment Lite Flow
entries.description: Fixed an issue where the loader spinner would not dismiss during the payment lite flow, blocking user interaction. No API changes required.

entries.title: Replaced Moshi with Gson
entries.description: Replaced the Moshi JSON serialization dependency with Gson to reduce SDK size and improve compatibility. No API changes required.

entries.title: Android Hint Type on Attrs
entries.description: Updated the Android hint type declaration on attributes that use resource references to ensure proper rendering across API levels. No API changes required.

entries.title: Payment Method Item Design
entries.description: Fixed visual design issues with payment method list items in the full SDK variant. No API changes required.

entries.title: Phone Field Visibility
entries.description: Fixed an issue where the phone number input field was incorrectly hidden in some payment flows. No API changes required.

entries.title: SafetyPay Payment Method
entries.description: Added support for SafetyPay as a payment method option. No API changes required.

entries.title: WebSocket Payment State Notifications
entries.description: Added WebSocket support for real-time payment state notifications during the checkout flow. No API changes required.

entries.title: CustomerForm Regex Validators
entries.description: Fixed regex validation errors in the CustomerForm that rejected valid input on certain fields. No API changes required.

entries.title: Transaction Status Set to Pending on Start
entries.description: The transaction status is now set to pending immediately upon payment initiation, providing more accurate state tracking. No API changes required.

entries.title: Internal Error State Callback
entries.description: Added an internal error state callback to surface SDK-level errors to the integrating application. No API changes required.

entries.title: CVV Regex Reset on Card Number Delete
entries.description: Fixed an issue where the CVV regex validator was not reset when the card number was deleted in the payment form, causing invalid CVV validation states. No API changes required.

entries.title: Bank Transfer and Card Payment Filter
entries.description: Added a payment type filter to allow displaying only bank transfer or card payment methods in the payment list view. No API changes required.

entries.title: Payment View Models Testing
entries.description: Added testing features for payment view models to facilitate integration testing. No API changes required.

entries.title: PIX and NuPay Payment Type Name
entries.description: Fixed incorrect payment type names displayed for PIX and NuPay methods in the payment list. No API changes required.

entries.title: UTC Timezone in DateExtension
entries.description: Updated `DateExtension` to use UTC timezone for all date formatting operations to ensure consistent date handling across regions. No API changes required.

entries.title: Payment Methods
entries.description: Initial release of the Yuno Android SDK with support for multiple payment methods including Mercado Pago Checkout Pro and debit/credit card payments.

entries.title: Mercado Pago Enrollment
entries.description: Added support for Mercado Pago method enrollment in the initial SDK release. No API changes required.

entries.title: Debit and Credit Card Payments
entries.description: Added support for debit and credit card payments with full card form UI. No API changes required.

entries.title: Initial Bug Fixes
entries.description: Fixed initial issues including city text field hint, PIX type in payments flow, card information on `startCheckout`, and English translation in the payment form title. No API changes required.
